jobs.title: Senior Software Engineer, Roblox Studio Performance
jobs.content:
About the role

Own the Roblox Studio creator-stack performance budgets across the Lua-VM hot path so experience-creators can iterate on million-MAU games at sub-frame latency.

  • C++ / Lua-VM / GPU-pipeline experience required

jobs.title: Senior Manager, Trust & Safety — Marketplace Integrity
jobs.content: Own the Roblox Marketplace integrity motion across UGC-listing review, Robux-economy abuse signals, and the Roblox Connect social-presence surface to keep the in-experience economy safe for all users.
